{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323154333A2837D3E09DAF8802DC3"}"},"total":26},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7606067492993368894","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"十分不错，把游戏王和崩三结合，脑洞大开，而且女孩子贴贴什么的最好了","text_exts":[{"e":9,"s":6,"text":"游戏王","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%B8%B8%E6%88%8F%E7%8E%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774251813F8802DC3%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227606067492993368894%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227504144811755064344%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%B8%B8%E6%88%8F%E7%8E%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770934832,"group_id":"7504144811755064344","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+5lSc/8oHV9Ffov7dWvDO0=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"721730163715160","user_name":"真的不想上学~"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"721730163715160","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7504144811755064344","book_info":{"abstract":"渊月一位稀有的女牌佬兼白龙癌晚期患者，在玩对局时，被渊眼白龙一发核弹送到了崩坏三的世界，成为了渊眼白龙兼拟似始源之律者。
作为曾经的挨过米家刀法的女舰长，渊月下定决心要用这份力量改变这个不完美的故事。
就这样渊月驱使着一条条的白龙，与琪亚娜几人一同跨越苦难的同时，渊月也在使用自己的力量一点一点的改变那些记忆中的意难平。
而当遇到琪亚娜等人无法解决的难题时……
渊月:“无穷的时间，蕴含在那始源之中的纯白之力，扬起在灵魂交错回响中震颤的双翼，从那苍青的深渊中现身吧！！渊眼白龙！！！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o9b9228c5c1761c7b48000c7ad742447c~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"青眼的余光","author_id":"","book_id":"7504144811755064344","book_name":"渊眼白龙的崩三之旅","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a0b0c0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1573人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":57,"name":"游戏动漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=57&name=游戏动漫&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7504145092291068440","read_count":"1573","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1129370"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"457","tags":"动漫衍生,游戏动漫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o9b9228c5c1761c7b48000c7ad742447c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435813&x-signature=E0JFXZ1kj8yd39lUFgC5g2ofteg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2557941177138043","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"78"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323154333A2837D3E09DAF8802DC3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读58分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3450,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":138},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7524639295529976601","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这个题材针对的人嗯有点少，但作者文笔不错。
